label: Area chart
description: A line chart with the area below filled; stack series to show composition over time.

params.label: Stacked
params.description: Stack series to show cumulative composition.

params.label: X key
params.description: Row field for the x axis.

params.label: Legend
params.description: Show the series legend (auto for ≥2 series).

params.label: Height
params.description: Pixel height, or a percent string for responsive containers.

params.label: Palette
params.description: Ordered hex colours; series/slices take them in turn.
